result.markdown:
---
title: "Differential Expression Analysis"
subtitle: "Step 4: Identifying differentially expressed genes"
sidebar: bulk-rnaseq
---

## Overview

Differential expression analysis identifies genes with statistically significant changes in expression between experimental conditions.

## DESeq2 Analysis

DESeq2 is the gold standard for differential expression analysis, using a negative binomial model.

### Setup DESeq2


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code  code-fold="false"}
library(DESeq2)
library(tidyverse)

# Load count matrix and metadata
counts <- read.csv("counts_matrix.csv", row.names = 1)
metadata <- read.csv("metadata.csv", row.names = 1)

# Ensure sample order matches
counts <- counts[, rownames(metadata)]

# Create DESeq2 dataset
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = counts,
  colData = metadata,
  design = ~ condition
)

# Set reference level
dds$condition <- relevel(dds$condition, ref = "control")
```
:::


### Pre-filtering


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
# Filter low-count genes
keep <- rowSums(counts(dds) >= 10) >= 3
dds <- dds[keep, ]
```
:::


### Run DESeq2


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code  code-fold="false"}
# Run the DESeq2 pipeline
dds <- DESeq(dds)

# Get results
res <- results(dds, contrast = c("condition", "treatment", "control"))

# Add gene symbols (if using Ensembl IDs)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
res$symbol <- mapIds(org.Hs.eg.db,
                     keys = rownames(res),
                     keytype = "ENSEMBL",
                     column = "SYMBOL")

# Order by adjusted p-value
res_ordered <- res[order(res$padj), ]
```
:::


### Results Summary


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
# Summary statistics
summary(res, alpha = 0.05)

# Count significant genes
sig_up <- sum(res$padj < 0.05 & res$log2FoldChange > 1, na.rm = TRUE)
sig_down <- sum(res$padj < 0.05 & res$log2FoldChange < -1, na.rm = TRUE)

message(sprintf("Upregulated genes (padj < 0.05, log2FC > 1): %d", sig_up))
message(sprintf("Downregulated genes (padj < 0.05, log2FC < -1): %d", sig_down))
```
:::


## Visualization

### MA Plot


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
plotMA(res, ylim = c(-5, 5), main = "MA Plot")
```
:::


### Volcano Plot


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code  code-fold="false"}
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)

# Prepare data for plotting
volcano_data <- as.data.frame(res) |>
  rownames_to_column("gene_id") |>
  mutate(
    significance = case_when(
      padj < 0.05 & log2FoldChange > 1 ~ "Upregulated",
      padj < 0.05 & log2FoldChange < -1 ~ "Downregulated",
      TRUE ~ "Not Significant"
    )
  )

# Get top genes for labeling
top_genes <- volcano_data |>
  filter(significance != "Not Significant") |>
  slice_min(padj, n = 20)

# Create volcano plot
ggplot(volcano_data, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = -log10(padj))) +
  geom_point(aes(color = significance), alpha = 0.6, size = 1.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-1, 1), linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = top_genes,
    aes(label = symbol),
    size = 3,
    max.overlaps = 15
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Upregulated" = "#e74c3c",
    "Downregulated" = "#3498db",
    "Not Significant" = "gray70"
  )) +
  labs(
    title = "Differential Expression Results",
    x = "Log2 Fold Change",
    y = "-Log10 Adjusted P-value",
    color = "Status"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```
:::


### Heatmap of Top Genes


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(pheatmap)

# Get normalized counts
vsd <- vst(dds, blind = FALSE)

# Select top DE genes
top_genes <- head(rownames(res_ordered), 50)
mat <- assay(vsd)[top_genes, ]

# Scale by row
mat_scaled <- t(scale(t(mat)))

# Create annotation
annotation_col <- data.frame(
  Condition = metadata$condition,
  row.names = rownames(metadata)
)

# Plot heatmap
pheatmap(
  mat_scaled,
  annotation_col = annotation_col,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_cols = TRUE,
  show_rownames = TRUE,
  fontsize_row = 8,
  main = "Top 50 Differentially Expressed Genes"
)
```
:::


## Sample Quality Assessment

### PCA Plot


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
plotPCA(vsd, intgroup = "condition") +
  theme_minimal() +
  ggtitle("PCA of Samples")
```
:::


### Sample Distance Heatmap


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
sampleDists <- dist(t(assay(vsd)))
sampleDistMatrix <- as.matrix(sampleDists)

pheatmap(
  sampleDistMatrix,
  clustering_distance_rows = sampleDists,
  clustering_distance_cols = sampleDists,
  main = "Sample Distance Matrix"
)
```
:::


## Export Results


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code  code-fold="false"}
# Export full results
res_df <- as.data.frame(res_ordered) |>
  rownames_to_column("gene_id") |>
  filter(!is.na(padj))

write_csv(res_df, "differential_expression_results.csv")

# Export significant genes only
sig_genes <- res_df |>
  filter(padj < 0.05, abs(log2FoldChange) > 1)

write_csv(sig_genes, "significant_genes.csv")
```
:::


## Next Steps

With DE results, proceed to [Pathway Analysis](05-pathway-analysis.qmd) for functional interpretation.
